title: Lenskart Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Lenskart Digital Technologies is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lenskart Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated E-commerce Executive to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Lenskart Digital Technologies:
Lenskart Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lenskart Digital Technologies!
